full_text:
Lu Qiang
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Qiang. Advised Emperor Ling to issue an amnesty when the Yellow Turbans rebelled. Lu Qiang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Lu Qiang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
